content: Phase 1: POC - Build backend models, auth, and core endpoints
Phase 1: POC - Create and run poc_core_flow.py test script (53/53 passed)
Phase 1: POC - Fix until all core tests pass
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design agent
Phase 2: Build complete backend API (all endpoints)
Phase 2: Build complete frontend (all screens - 13 pages)
Phase 2: All user stories covered in Development and Testing
Phase 2: End to End Testing using Testing Agent (26/26 backend, 95% frontend)
Phase 3: Hardening - User management, pagination, overdue task
Phase 4: Create GitHub repo with README.md and .agents/agents.md
